description: F2 conversation pin/unpin (coverage-widening, hermetic): drive l3_set_pinned and prove a pin/unpin round-trips through l3_dump_state.pinnedConversations (the Prefs-backed pinned set FakeConversationManager.setPinned writes — the same UIKit long-press 'pin' path). Pins the seeded echo-peer C2C conversation, asserts its id enters the pinned set, unpins, asserts the set is empty again. Starts AND ends with an empty pinned set so the fixture self-cleans even if interrupted (the start wait_for catches a dirty fixture). No echo round-trip — pinning is local Prefs state, so this is a hermetic hard gate. Maps to feature F2.
